steps: Vendor Recommnded Amounts for Different Culture Vessels %s %s Culture Dish Culture Medium (mL) Plasmid (ug) Diluent (mL) PolyJet (uL) 48-well 0.3 0.25 2 x 0.015 0.75 12-well 0.75 0.75 2 x 0.038 2.25 6-well 1.0 1.0 2 x 0.05 3.0 35 mm dish 1.0 1.0 2 x 0.05 3.0 60 mm dish 2.8 2.5 2 x 0.10 7.5 10 cm dish 5.0 5.0 2 x 0.25 15.0 T75 flask 8.0 9.8 - 18.0 2 x 0.40 27.0 - 54.0 250 mL flask 18 25 - 50 2 x 0.8 75.0 - 150.0

Cells should be at 30 - 80% confluence depending on experiment. If I plan to collect cells 3 days later, I will transfect at 30% confluence. If I will collect them 1 day later, then I will transfect ~80% confluence
For a 6-well plate: Replace media with 1.0mL fresh culture media 30 - 45 minutes prior to transfection
For each well: Dilute 2.0 ug DNA in 50mL high glucose DMEM (12.0ug in 300uL for 6-well plate)
For each well: Dilute 3.0 uL PolyJet into 50uL high glucose DMEM (18.0uL in 300uL per 6-well plate)
Add PolyJet/DMEM mixture to DNA/DMEM mixture in 1:1 proportion
Incubate DNA/PolyJet mixture at RT for 15 minutes
Add 100uL DNA/PolyJet mixture to each well
Incubate cells with DNA/PolyJect mixture for 6 - 18hrs
Replace media with fresh culture media
creator: Christopher Bartley
